summary: Selected GPT Image 2 concept 002 for the title screen, recommended the condensed sci-fi font direction, and approved the gunmetal/cyan/green title palette for the runtime title and loading screen.
fontDirection: Wide condensed sci-fi sans, all caps, squared cuts, no decorative rune font for core UI.

avoid: center-right title placement over the portal
fake HUD panels on the title image
decorative rune font for primary UI
